content: I heard a loud argument coming from Arjun’s house at 10:45 PM. It sounded like two men shouting — one was Arjun, the other deeper. I looked out my window but it was dark. I didn’t see anyone. I told the police because I thought it was important. I didn’t know Arjun was dead then. I didn’t see a car leave. I just heard noise. I don’t know who it was. I swear I’m telling the truth.
